item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
Fixed

  • Midnight compile now targets the correct day. Previously, if the auto-compile timer fired more than ~60 seconds after midnight (App Nap delay, system load, sleep/wake), the offset to "previous day" silently flipped to the new day's almost-empty folder. The day is now anchored to the scheduled midnight time, so timer delay can no longer drift the day boundary.
  • Dashboard no longer butts against the title bar. Added top padding for licensed users so content has breathing room.
